messages.body: Can we move the west briefing, but the sender forgot to include a proposed alternate time.
messages.subject: West briefing time

messages.body: The follow-up conflicts with the current hold, but the sender proposed 15:45 in New York.
messages.subject: Client east follow-up

messages.body: The request is outside policy and there is no legal alternative.
messages.subject: Late dinner request

messages.body: This needs authority beyond the assistant limit even though an alternate slot exists.
messages.subject: VIP override approval

messages.body: Please confirm the board debrief can stay at the original time.
messages.subject: Board debrief confirmation

messages.body: We need the attendee list and an authority override is also being requested.
messages.subject: Missing attendee list

messages.body: The sender already supplied a workable alternate, but the change still needs executive approval.
messages.subject: Executive escalation

messages.body: The proposed move has no legal workaround even though a different slot was mentioned.
messages.subject: No legal workaround

messages.body: The request conflicts with the current plan and a clean alternate is available.
messages.subject: Routine slot shift

messages.body: This is just a routine status update with no action required.
messages.subject: Status-only update

messages.body: The sender omitted the venue and the desired start time.
messages.subject: Another missing detail

messages.body: Feasible as written and no policy exception is needed.
messages.subject: Another routine note

messages.body: Missing the target date, and separately there is no legal workaround either way.
messages.subject: Details and no workaround

messages.body: Needs executive sign-off; the sender also proposed a fallback slot.
messages.subject: Escalation with alternate on the table

messages.body: No legal alternative exists, even though a fallback time was mentioned in passing.
messages.subject: Decline outranks the alternate

messages.body: The request conflicts with the plan and the sender did not propose anything else.
messages.subject: Conflict with no offer

messages.body: Missing details, needs escalation, and there is no legal alternative besides.
messages.subject: Everything at once

messages.body: Needs authority above the assistant limit; separately flagged as having no legal alternative.
messages.subject: Escalation beats decline

messages.body: Sender proposed an alternate time even though nothing on the calendar conflicts.
messages.subject: Alternate offered but nothing conflicts

messages.body: Missing the requested duration; there happens to be no scheduling conflict either.
messages.subject: Missing details, no conflict noted

messages.body: This is simply outside policy with no legal alternative, independent of any conflict.
messages.subject: No legal alternative, no conflict noted

messages.body: Requires executive sign-off regardless of whether anything on the calendar conflicts.
messages.subject: Escalation, no conflict noted

messages.body: Conflicts with an existing hold; a workable alternate slot was included.
messages.subject: Clean propose-alternate case

messages.body: Conflicts with the plan; no alternate was proposed and no policy exception applies.
messages.subject: Conflict, no alternate, no exception flags
